payload.title: trust fix — whole-crate vanilla→strict rewrite
payload.description:
A 'trust fix' command that rewrites a whole vanilla crate into strict form — auto-inserting named args from the CalleeRegistry, itemising globs, etc. — so an agent onboards a codebase in one command.

Reuses the registry from Tier 0. Pairs with the structured-fix story: same edit engine, batch-applied across a crate.
